ActivateSubscription.name: ActivateSubscription
ActivateSubscription.documentation: Activates a Subscription to enable billing for a user.

CreateDomain.name: CreateDomain
CreateDomain.documentation: Creates a new Domain for managing HealthAgent resources.

CreateSubscription.name: CreateSubscription
CreateSubscription.documentation: Creates a new Subscription within a Domain for billing and user management.

DeactivateSubscription.name: DeactivateSubscription
DeactivateSubscription.documentation: Deactivates a Subscription to stop billing for a user.

DeleteDomain.name: DeleteDomain
DeleteDomain.documentation: Deletes a Domain and all associated resources.

GetMedicalScribeListeningSession.name: GetMedicalScribeListeningSession
GetMedicalScribeListeningSession.documentation: Retrieves details about an existing Medical Scribe listening session

GetPatientInsightsJob.name: GetPatientInsightsJob
GetPatientInsightsJob.documentation: Get details of a started patient insights job.

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.documentation: Lists the tags associated with the specified resource

StartMedicalScribeListeningSession.name: StartMedicalScribeListeningSession
StartMedicalScribeListeningSession.documentation: Starts a new Medical Scribe listening session for real-time audio transcription

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.documentation: Associates the specified tags with the specified resource

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.documentation: Removes the specified tags from the specified resource

AccessDeniedException.documentation: This error is thrown when the client does not supply proper credentials to the API.

domainId.documentation: The unique identifier of the parent Domain.

ClinicalNoteGenerationSettingsResponse.documentation: Response containing settings for clinical note generation

ConflictException.documentation: This error is thrown when a resource update is no longer valid due to assumptions about initial state changing.

webAppSetupConfiguration.documentation: Configuration for the Domain web application. Optional, but if provided all fields are required.

templateType.documentation: The base template type that was customized

nextToken.documentation: Token for the next page of results.

templateType.documentation: The type of managed template to use

MedicalScribeTranscriptEvent.documentation: An event containing transcript data from the Medical Scribe stream

audioEndOffset.documentation: The offset from audio start when the audio for this segment ends

isPartial.documentation: Indicates whether this is a partial or final transcript

MedicalScribeTranscriptSegment.documentation: A segment of transcript text with timing and channel information
